query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A young boy wearing a green and white striped polo shirt and blue jeans sits on a large, weathered yellow and white playground structure. He holds onto a metal handle with one hand while his body leans outward, mouth open in an expression of exhilaration. The background shows streaks of motion suggesting rapid spinning.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young boy wearing a green and white striped polo shirt and blue jeans sits on a large, weathered yellow and white playground structure, his body leaning outward with an expression of exhilaration. The image uses intentional radial blur streaking outward from the center to create a vivid sense of rapid spinning motion. The saturated green shirt clashes against the warm yellow and orange tones of the worn structure, while the tilted, dynamic framing enhances the feeling of unstable, centrifugal energy.
